14 July 2026

My First Game Jam

by

Date Published: July 14, 2026
Tags: C# Arcade Gameplay Endless Unity

Overview

While I have attempted at doing game jams before they never fully worked out and this was my first one where I was able to plan, implement and publish on time. Only finding about it the same day and with 5 hours to do it. Thankfully while I couldn’t plan too much, I was able to think of an idea while I was taking care of other responsibilities in the morning. An idea of a game where you dodge enemies while they attack the player isn’t unique fundamentally, but with limited time it worked perfectly at doing this specific game jam.

Plans


Figure 1: Showing the inital plans with links to resources. (Figure is clickable).

C:\Users\apuid\Documents\GitHub\Portfolio\assets\blogs\2026-07-14-MyFirstGameJam.md\Plans.png

These w

Overview

While I have attempted at doing game jams before they never fully worked out and this was my first one where I was able to plan, implement and publish on time. Only finding about it the same day and with 5 hours to do it. Thankfully while I couldn’t plan too much, I was able to think of an idea while I was taking care of other responsibilities in the morning. An idea of a game where you dodge enemies while they attack the player isn’t unique fundamentally, but with limited time it worked perfectly at doing this specific game jam.

Plans

These were were my inital plans for the project and since time was limited the list became the priotry in which each mechanic was added.

- Player movement / Simple.

- Enemy movement / Follow player, jump onto them and fall through. // Previous

- Enemy spawns / Spawners.

- Collision / Walls, player/enemy.

- UI / Menus, game UI, more.

- Sounds.

Entry

This was the summited entry I did for gamebridge 2026 game jam.
